dsl_rule.translation_notes: Used price_pos_20 (0-1 scale) to represent price position within 20-bar range, converted 10-25% rise to 0.10-0.25 decimal range. Used rsi_14 as standard RSI indicator. Used dc_lower (20-bar Donchian low) as proxy for 20-bar swing low. RSI > 80 captures overbought reversal condition. 2 ATR reversal condition omitted as it requires multi-indicator calculation; stop_loss_pct set conservatively. Signal direction is LONG as it warns against entering late in uptrends.

backtest_rule.reason: Used price_pos_20 (0-1 scale) to represent price position within 20-bar range, converted 10-25% rise to 0.10-0.25 decimal range. Used rsi_14 as standard RSI indicator. Used dc_lower (20-bar Donchian low) as proxy for 20-bar swing low. RSI > 80 captures overbought reversal condition. 2 ATR reversal condition omitted as it requires multi-indicator calculation; stop_loss_pct set conservatively. Signal direction is LONG as it warns against entering late in uptrends.

source_rule_text: A trader should avoid entering a trend-following trade after a prolonged move has already occurred, as late entry into an already overbought market results in capturing diminishing gains and amplified drawdown risk.
